user.name: Elite Alchemist
user.bio: Staff Engineer & Competitive Programmer. Specializing in high-throughput microservices and advanced DP algorithms.

problems.title: Two Sum Matrix
problems.description:
Given an array of integers `nums` and an integer `target`, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to `target`.

You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution, and you may not use the same element twice.
problems.solutionExplanation: Use a hash map to record the index of elements we have visited. For each element `x`, verify if `target - x` is already present in our map.

problems.title: Dynamic Palindromic Grid
problems.description:
Find the longest palindromic substring in a given string `s`.

Input: s = "babad"
Output: "bab"
Note: "aba" is also a valid answer.
problems.solutionExplanation: Establish a boolean table DP table where table[i][j] is true if substring s[i..j] is a palindrome.

problems.title: Maximal Flow Network
problems.description: Compute the maximum possible flow from a source vertex `s` to a sink vertex `t` in a directed graph with edge capacities.
problems.solutionExplanation: Use Breadth-First-Search (BFS) in Edmond-Karp to repeatedly find augmenting paths in the residual graph.
